description_long: This is a knitted, light gray beanie hat with a soft, flexible structure and a ribbed texture running vertically around its surface. The hat is seamless, with no visible decorative elements, and is designed to fit snugly over the head, providing warmth and comfort. Its crown is rounded and slightly slouched, giving it a relaxed, casual appearance typical of urban winter wear. The material appears to be a soft yarn, likely acrylic or wool, with a consistent knit pattern throughout. There is no brim, and the edge is finished with the same ribbed knit as the rest of the hat. No brand or logo is visible on the exterior.
description: A light gray, ribbed knit beanie with a rounded, slouched crown and no brim or visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, ribbed crown and the seamless knit texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slouched, flexible shape and the continuous ribbed pattern.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the concentric ribbing converging at the crown's center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the relaxed, slightly asymmetrical drape of the beanie.
